critic_notes: Section 7.4 is strong on substance. All eight quotes verify verbatim against the normalized source despite the known page-break injection mid-section. Notable: 7.4-005 trims the quote at 'Konsequenzen' rather than extending to 'in der Sicherheitsorganisation führen.' Verified this is a correct defensive choice — the raw text splits the word as 'Sicher[soft-hyphen]\n' followed by a page-number/page-header/document-title block and then 'heitsorganisation', so the normalization rule (which only joins soft-hyphen+newline, not soft-hyphen+multi-line noise) would fail to rejoin. The trimmed quote is still a clean verbatim substring and the answer's paraphrase ('Konsequenzen in der Sicherheitsorganisation führen') is unambiguously supported by the underlying prose. 7.4-007 is correctly labeled topic=check (audit mechanics/independence). 7.4-006 labeled experte is borderline but acceptable — the 'proaktiv' nuance requires reading past the surface. Page ranges fit 30-31 manifest, with 7.4-005 straddling both pages appropriately. Schema correct.
